name: tokenoptimizer
notes: Web app (FastAPI + static HTML) that converts JSON arrays to TOON format (columnar CSV-like: 'root[N]{col1,col2}:\nval,...'). Runs a local server; user pastes JSON into a browser UI and copies the TOON output. No agent integration, no hooks, no CLI proxy — purely a manual conversion tool requiring the user to manually reformat data before sending it to an LLM. Not cache-safe in any meaningful sense: it does not touch the agent pipeline at all. Target: any LLM user who wants to manually compress JSON payloads. Single-commit repo, no releases, no tags.
